narrative:
Precinct Jackson Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 444 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
